name: Terraform Cloud
description: Terraform Cloud — HashiCorp's managed Terraform platform with remote state, cost estimation, and policy enforcement.

seo.title: Terraform Cloud — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: Terraform Cloud: Terraform Cloud — HashiCorp's managed Terraform platform with remote state, cost estimation, and policy enforcement.

when_to_use: Remote Terraform state management with locking
Cost estimation before applying infrastructure changes
VCS-triggered runs for GitOps infrastructure workflows

pros: Managed remote state with locking, no S3 plumbing
Policy as code with Sentinel or OPA
Cost estimation and drift detection built in
VCS-driven runs plug directly into PRs
cons: Pricing jumps sharply past free tier
BSL license fallout still clouds the ecosystem
review.verdict: The simplest way to run Terraform at team scale, if you accept HashiCorp's pricing and BSL baggage.
review.best_for: Teams standardizing on Terraform who want managed state, policy, and runs.
review.not_for: Teams moving to OpenTofu or those needing fully self-hosted workflows cheaply.
